messages.content: can't sleep, brain's just buzzing. you up?

I'm here.

1 a.m. with a buzzing brain — that particular kind of tired where rest won't come. What's running through your mind tonight?
had way too much coffee at like 4pm, rookie mistake. now i'm wired

That 4 p.m. coffee has a way of collecting its debt right when you least want it to.

Is it mostly the physical restlessness, or is there something on your mind keeping pace with it?
kinda nice though, the apartment's all quiet and i'm just messing around on my phone

There's something about that late-night quiet that feels like borrowed time — the world paused for a moment.

What are you messing around with?
i've got my buddy sam coming over tomorrow to watch the game so i should really try to sleep soon
Good reason to wind down. A quiet apartment at 1 a.m. is a decent place to start.
alright i'm gonna put the phone down and try counting backwards or whatever. night
Good luck with the countdown. Hope the quiet carries you off quickly — enjoy the game tomorrow.
